monsters.name: Barbarian Dummy
monsters.description: A rugged dummy clad in furs, wielding a blunted axe.

monsters.name: Illusionist Dummy
monsters.description: A dummy that seems to shift and blur, making it hard to focus on.

monsters.name: Mage Dummy
monsters.description: A rune-carved wooden dummy that hums with arcane energy.

monsters.name: Monk Dummy
monsters.description: A wooden dummy wrapped in prayer beads, posed in a martial stance.

monsters.name: Paladin Dummy
monsters.description: A shining dummy in plate armor, radiating a holy aura.

monsters.name: Rogue Dummy
monsters.description: A shadowy dummy that seems to fade in and out of view.

monsters.name: Training Dummy
monsters.description: A straw-stuffed dummy for combat practice.
